stories.title: My Day Auto-Add
acceptance_criteria: Setting myday_auto_add exists with options: off, due_today, due_today_or_overdue — default due_today
Setting myday_readd_dismissed exists as boolean string — default true
Both settings appear in Settings > Projects > My Day tab
Re-add toggle is hidden when auto-add mode is off
On app launch, tasks matching auto-add criteria have is_in_my_day set to 1
Auto-added tasks show Remove from My Day (not Add to My Day)
Subtasks (parent_id IS NOT NULL) are NOT auto-added
Done-status tasks are NOT auto-added
Removing a task from My Day sets my_day_dismissed_date to today (or 9999-12-31 if re-add is off)
Dismissed tasks are not re-added on the same day
With myday_readd_dismissed = true, dismissed tasks are re-added the next day
With myday_readd_dismissed = false, dismissed tasks get 9999-12-31 and stay dismissed permanently
Manually adding a task back to My Day clears my_day_dismissed_date to null
findMyDay() in both SQLite and Supabase TaskRepository only checks is_in_my_day = 1 (no dual filter)
MyDayView.tsx client-side filter only checks is_in_my_day === 1
Context menu My Day toggle simplified to two branches (no move due date to tomorrow case)
Bulk context menu includes dismissed date logic
Telegram /myday returns is_in_my_day = 1 PLUS tasks due today or overdue, sorted by due date
my_day_dismissed_date column exists in SQLite (migration_16) and Supabase
my_day_dismissed_date is in TASK_UPDATABLE_COLUMNS in both SQLite and Supabase repos
my_day_dismissed_date is included in PersonalSyncService push and pull mappings
Auto-add changes sync to Supabase via updated_at diff
npm run typecheck passes with zero errors
npm run test passes with all existing and new tests

stories.title: Per-Integration Default Project
acceptance_criteria: Shared Default Project dropdown removed from top of Settings > Integrations
Telegram Bot sub-tab has its own Default Project dropdown
iOS Shortcut sub-tab has Default Project with Follow Telegram default option (default) and per-project options
When iOS Shortcut is set to Follow Telegram, it shows the Telegram default name in parentheses
/default in Telegram shows both Telegram and iOS Shortcut current defaults
/default shows Change Telegram and Change iOS Shortcut inline buttons
Tapping Change Telegram shows project list with checkmark on current default
Tapping Change iOS Shortcut shows Follow Telegram option at top plus project list
Setting Telegram default via bot updates telegram_default_project in Supabase user_settings
Setting iOS default via bot updates ios_shortcut_default_project in Supabase user_settings
Choosing Follow Telegram for iOS deletes the ios_shortcut_default_project setting
quick_add_task Supabase function checks ios_shortcut_default_project first then falls back to telegram_default_project then first owned project
iOS Shortcut does NOT need to be rebuilt when changing its default project
Existing telegram_default_project values continue to work (no breaking change)
npm run typecheck passes with zero errors
npm run test passes with all existing and new tests

stories.title: AND/OR Label Filter Logic
acceptance_criteria: Label filter picker shows three operator options: is any of, is all of, is not
is any of (OR) is the default — matches current behavior
is all of (AND) requires tasks to have ALL selected labels
is not excludes tasks with any of the selected labels (existing behavior unchanged)
Other filter type pickers (status, priority, assignee, project) keep the two-way is / is not toggle only
AND label filtering works in SavedViewListView, MyDayView, TaskListView, and CalendarView
AND label filtering works in TaskRepository.search() SQL query using subquery with HAVING COUNT
Label logic mode persists in saved view filter_config as labelLogic
Existing saved views without labelLogic default to any (no breaking change)
MCP search_tasks tool supports label_logic parameter
Label filter chips display the current logic mode (is any of / is all of prefix)
Switching between is any of and is all of updates results immediately
npm run typecheck passes with zero errors
npm run test passes with all existing and new tests

stories.title: Per-Project Auto-Archive
acceptance_criteria: projects table has auto_archive_enabled, auto_archive_value, auto_archive_unit columns
Each personal project can independently enable/disable auto-archive with custom timing
Settings > Projects > [project] shows auto-archive toggle with value/unit controls
Shared projects show Manual only message in settings (no toggle)
Auto-archive in App.tsx reads per-project settings instead of global settings
Shared projects are never auto-archived regardless of settings
Global auto-archive settings removed from Settings > General
Migration applies existing global auto-archive setting to all personal projects
Migration deletes global auto-archive setting keys from settings table
New projects default to auto-archive disabled
Per-project auto-archive settings sync to Supabase via PersonalSyncService
My Day Done bucket only shows tasks completed today — not previous days
Done tasks from previous days are hidden from My Day but NOT archived or modified
npm run typecheck passes with zero errors
npm run test passes with all existing and new tests
